question: The chart displays the percentage share of product ratings by category. Based on the percentage values shown next to each point, which of the following statements is correct?

options.A: Quality has the lowest percentage share among all the categories.
options.B: Price has a higher percentage share than Support.
options.C: Support has the highest percentage share among the categories.
options.D: Design has a higher percentage share than Delivery.

explanation: The labels show the actual values; dot positions are based on a different 'visual_height' scale, so the visual can suggest a different ranking than the data.
